name: forge
description: Model-agnostic, self-learning, self-healing agent harness + Python SDK to build agent swarms. Lives at github.com/jbellsolutions/forge, published as forge-harness on PyPI.

key_components.role: L2 — tool registry + builtins (web_search, web_fetch, fs, etc.)
L3 — provider profiles (anthropic, openai, openrouter, etc.)
L5 — skill registry, eval gate, autosynth
Cross-cut — passive RSS pull + active auto-research
Papa Bear chat agent for the dashboard
`forge new` — describe a swarm in English, get a swarm

entry_points: forge.mcp_server:main (forge as a stdio MCP server)
fragile_areas: forge/dashboard/db.py::make_engine — psycopg3 dialect rewrite for postgres URLs
forge/intel/fetch.py — atom parsing relies on Element.find returning None correctly (Python 3.14 changed Element.__bool__ semantics)
forge/recursion/llm_proposer.py — `intel_context=None` must remain byte-identical to pre-extension behavior
